name: Salmon Surprise Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 ounces) frozen chopped spinach, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with bread crumbs.
Drain the salmon; debone and discard any dark skin.
Place the drained salmon in a large bowl.
Press liquid from the spinach.
Combine spinach, saltines, green onion, parsley, egg substitute, evaporated skimmed milk, lemon rind and juice, dill weed, and pepper in a food processor. Whirl until all ingredients are finely chopped.
Add the vegetable mixture to the salmon; mix well with clean hands to blend thoroughly.
Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated 350 degree F oven for 50 minutes or until lightly browned.
Cool the loaf in the pan for 10 minutes.
Invert the loaf onto a serving platter.
